mapper.sql: id, sub_scenic_id, sub_scenic_name, in_people, out_people, income, report_matters, create_time, remark, id_delete,user_id,report_time, total_num, team_num, alone_num, complaints_rescue, food_service_num, sentiment_state, wechat_article_num, reserve_total_num, reserve_team_num, reserve_alone_num, province_top1, top1_count, province_top2, top2_count, province_top3, top3_count, province_top4, top4_count, province_top5, top5_count, province_top6, top6_count, province_top7, top7_count, province_top8, top8_count, province_top9, top9_count, province_top10, top10_count
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id as id , a.sub_scenic_id as senic_id , a.sub_scenic_name as senic_name , a.in_people as in_people , a.income as income , report_base_scenic.contact_people as contact_people , report_base_scenic.contact_phone as contact_phone , report_base_scenic.scenic_phone as scenic_phone , a.report_time as report_time, a.total_num as total_num, a.food_service_num as food_service_num, a.reserve_total_num as reserve_total_num FROM(SELECT * FROM base_scenic_report ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 1000) a left join report_base_scenic on a.sub_scenic_id = report_base_scenic.id where id_delete = 0
and (a.sub_scenic_name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.id like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.report_time like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.total_num like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.reserve_total_num like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.food_service_num like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_scenic.contact_people like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_scenic.contact_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_scenic.scenic_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
GROUP BY a.sub_scenic_id

SELECT sum( in_people ) inPeople, sum(out_people) outPeople, sum( income ) income, create_time createTime FROM base_scenic_report where user_id =#{userId} and create_time like Concat(#{nowDate},'%') and id_delete = 0
select sum(income) from base_scenic_report where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0
